## Product

## Dimension

`Freshness` / `Audience-safety` / `Portability` / `Operational provenance`

## Current score

(Look at `scoring/<product>.md` for the current value.)

## Public evidence

URLs / quotes / hands-on test details. We require public evidence; private claims aren't scoreable.

## Reasoning

Why does the evidence support a different score?
